title: Market Brief — Saturday, April 4, 2026
summary: Compute remains scarce across all GPU classes. H100 availability sits at 20% (57/291), H200 at 28% (112/404), and B200 at 27% (94/351), all below the oversupply threshold but H100 nearing severe shortage territory. The headline move is B200 spot crashing 23.7% overnight to $3.81/hr, signaling either new supply coming online or a sudden demand pullback on next-gen silicon.
paragraphs: Compute remains scarce across all GPU classes. H100 availability sits at 20% (57/291), H200 at 28% (112/404), and B200 at 27% (94/351), all below the oversupply threshold but H100 nearing severe shortage territory. The headline move is B200 spot crashing 23.7% overnight to $3.81/hr, signaling either new supply coming online or a sudden demand pullback on next-gen silicon.

After applying the 1.25x TCO multiplier, true production cost on Llama 70B runs $7.03/M on H100, $5.56/M on H200, and $3.49/M on B200. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.38/M output and Meta Llama 4 Maverick at $0.60/M are both selling far below self-hosted TCO, burning cash to buy market share. Provider grades: OpenAI Strong, Anthropic Neutral, Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash, Meta Burning Cash.

OpenAI o3 Pro at $80/M output is overvalued when GPT-5.4 delivers comparable reasoning at $15/M, an 81% discount on the same provider's stack. The B200 spot collapse to $3.81/hr makes self-hosted inference on next-gen GPUs the best risk-adjusted trade in the market right now.
bullets: 20% of H100 GPUs are available (57 of 291), approaching the severe shortage threshold of 15%.
112 of 404 H200 GPUs are free, putting availability at 28% amid tightening demand.
$3.81/hr B200 spot median represents a 23.7% single-day price drop, the largest move across all GPU classes.
$0.38/M output from DeepSeek V3.2 implies a per-token loss of roughly $3.11/M against TCO-adjusted B200 production cost.
21.41 on the LLMflation Index means token prices have fallen roughly 79% since GPT-4 launched at the $60/M baseline.
$0.15/M input on Llama 4 Maverick is the cheapest token price across all 18 tracked models.
